name: Xaviersobased
description:
'''Xavier Lopez''' (born October 23, 2003), known professionally as '''Xaviersobased''' (stylized in [[Letter case|lowercase]]), is an American [[rapper]] and [[record producer]] known for his eccentric rapping and production style. He is credited alongside his collective 1c34 with pioneering the [[Jerk (music genre)|jerk]] [[microgenre]].  

Lopez began releasing music as Xaviersobased in 2016. He later joined the [[online rap]] collectives [[Novagang]] and [[Jewelxxet]]. In 2022, he gained popularity online with the song "[[Patchmade]]" produced by kashpaint. The song was described by British magazine ''[[The Face (magazine)|The Face]]'' as a "jerk anthem". In 2024, he released the mixtape ''[[Keep It Goin Xav]]'', as well as the singles "[[40 (single)|40]]" and "[[Impact (single)|Impact]]" with rapper [[Nettspend]].   

In 2025, he signed to [[Atlantic Records]] and released the EP ''[[Once More (EP)|Once More]]'', which was followed by the "Riverside" American tour. In 2026, he launched the "Riverside tour 2.0" in Europe and released his self-titled debut album [[Xavier (album)|''Xavier'']].
